title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Synergy Property Development - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
